felicidad.label: Joy
felicidad.weekly_message: Joy was very present this week. Letting yourself enjoy it is also part of your growth.
felicidad.biweekly_context: This emotional state has appeared often lately. Noticing what supports it can help you sustain it.

motivacion.label: Motivation
motivacion.weekly_message: Motivation was your driving force this week. Use that momentum with clear, realistic next steps.
motivacion.biweekly_context: This drive has remained steady. Moving forward with focus, without overpushing, can turn it into consistency.

calma.label: Calm
calma.weekly_message: Calm defined your week. A steady pace is also meaningful progress.
calma.biweekly_context: This state has stayed present over time. Protecting your pauses can help maintain that balance.

cansancio.label: Fatigue
cansancio.weekly_message: Fatigue showed up this week. Listening to it with kindness is also self-care.
cansancio.biweekly_context: This state has repeated over recent weeks. Adjusting your pace and prioritizing rest may help.

ansiedad.label: Anxiety
ansiedad.weekly_message: Anxiety was present this week. Returning to simple actions and conscious breathing can help regulate it.
ansiedad.biweekly_context: This state repeated on several days. Consistent micro-pauses can help you feel more grounded.

tristeza.label: Sadness
tristeza.weekly_message: Sadness was present. Naming it without judgment is already an act of care.
tristeza.biweekly_context: This mood appeared at different moments. Slow, supported steps are still progress.

frustracion.label: Frustration
frustracion.weekly_message: Frustration made itself felt. Adjusting expectations without quitting is also progress.
frustracion.biweekly_context: This state appeared when pressure was higher. Celebrating small wins can help rebuild momentum.
